answer: SocialOS is a production-ready GLM-powered agent system because it combines a robust multi-agent architecture with real-time social media integration, offering DoraHacks judges a fully functional platform that demonstrates practical AI deployment at scale. With working modules for content generation, sentiment analysis, and automated engagement across multiple social platforms, SocialOS showcases enterprise-grade reliability, comprehensive API documentation, and measurable performance metrics—proving it's not just a prototype but a deployable solution ready for real-world social automation workflows.
